title: Cole — User Profile
content:
# Cole — User Profile

## Role & Background
- Data analyst at Iron Tree Service (day job)
- Independently building software products with AI-assisted development as primary workflow
- Long-term goal: independent income through software
- Limited TypeScript experience; stronger in Python and data analysis
- Self-identified ADHD tendency to start new projects — actively manages this by maintaining priority discipline
- Plays D&D/PF2e and uses Foundry VTT
- Development hardware: RTX 3070 (8GB VRAM), Windows 11

## Active Projects (Priority Order)
1. **Sylvara** — CRM/ops platform for tree service companies (🔴 High)
2. **Lumen GM Hub** — AI-powered GM companion for PF2e/Foundry VTT (🟡 Medium)
3. **Failstate** — 2D roguelike in Unity (⚪ Paused)

## Working Style
- Uses Obsidian vault as project memory system with brain files, journals, and project docs
- Two-AI review loop: Claude Code + GPT-4 for plan.md and AGENTS.md changes
- Prefers milestone-based planning over individual tickets
- Values privacy-first architecture (Lumen local tier)
- Prefers manual-first approaches over auto-triggering (respects user's API budget)
- Uses AGENTS.md pattern across all projects that use Codex

## Key People
- **John Maestranzi** — co-owner, Iron Tree Service
- **Eric Roensch** — co-owner, Iron Tree Service
- **Savannah Sadowski** — Iron Tree office staff
- **Larry Seely** — Iron Tree CFO
